\n[!] En Ext4, cuando se borra un archiv: [!] In Ext4, when a file is deleted, the inode is marked as free, data blocks are freed in the bitmap,
y la entrada del directorio se compa: and the directory entry is compacted, unlinking the filename immediately.
Por lo tanto, la recuperación basada: Therefore, directory metadata-based recovery is not feasible using this listing.
Se recomienda utilizar el comando 'c: It is recommended to use the 'carve' command instead, or analyze the filesystem Journal (jbd2) if available.

\n💡 Tip forense: Podés escribir '<comand: 💡 Forensic tip: You can type '<command> ?' or 'help <command>' to view detailed parameters.
Realiza File Carving automatizado buscan:
Performs automated File Carving searching for Magic Bytes on the partition or entire disk.

        Usage:
          carve                          -> save to current directory, all types
          carve <dest_directory>         -> save to specified directory, all types
          carve [dir] jpg pdf png        -> filter specific types
          carve --disk [dir] [types...]  -> force scan of entire disk/full forensic image
          carve --max-size 50MB          -> overwrite maximum carve size
          carve --types jpg,png          -> filter specific types explicitly

        Supported types: defined in signatures.conf (default: jpg, png, pdf, zip, exe, gif, rar, mp3, db, elf...)
        If no directory is specified, current working directory is used.
